qa_pair.question: List all cubes whose name starts with "}" (control cubes) and report the count.
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_list_cubes -> filter Name startswith "}" -> count

qa_pair.question: For the cube named "}ClientProperties", how many dimensions does it have?
Which TI process is invoked by the most chores in the system? Report the process name. If multiple tie, report any one.
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_list_chores -> tally tasks[].processName -> arg max

qa_pair.question: Identify all TI processes whose Prolog code references the function "ItemReject". Report the count.
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_search_code with regex "ItemReject" scope=prolog -> count distinct processes

qa_pair.question: For the dimension "}Clients", how many leaf-level (Numeric) elements does it contain?
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_get_hierarchy }Clients -> count elements where type == "Numeric"

qa_pair.question: Find the cube with the largest number of rule statements. Report the cube name.
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_get_all_cube_rules -> for each cube count rule lines -> arg max

qa_pair.question: Among all chores, how many are currently active (toggle on)?
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_list_chores -> count where active == true

qa_pair.question: Validate the references of TI process "}bedrock.cube.create" - does the process compile cleanly with no missing object references? Answer "yes" or "no".
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_validate_process_refs }bedrock.cube.create -> "yes" if no errors else "no"

qa_pair.question: Using the callgraph analysis, list all processes that are called by no other process and call no other process (orphans). Report the count.
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_analyze_callgraph -> count nodes with in-degree 0 AND out-degree 0

qa_pair.question: For the cube "SalesCube" (or any cube of choice if absent), check whether the coordinate (Time=2024, Region=Germany, Measure=Revenue) is writable. Answer "writable" or "not writable" or "not found".
qa_pair.answer: TODO: tm1_check_writable_coords -> map response to label
